items.title: OpenAI may go public as soon as September
items.summary: OpenAI's potential IPO would come after a jury sided with CEO Sam Altman in a legal battle with Elon Musk.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software is creeping into Europe
items.summary: First came the Netherlands, now it's Lithuania. And more European countries appear to be in the queue for Tesla's driver assistance system.
